prerequisites.value: Base attack bonus +11 or monk level 11th; at least one combination feat.

description.value: **Benefit:** The first time in a round you use a combination feat to apply a reduction or penalty to yourself or an enemy, you can double the featâs numerical modifier. For example, you can double the reduction granted by Combat Rhythm to â2. This does not double any other effects of combination feats, such as damage.
